title: Operations Ledger Workbench
concept: A file and data operations workbench that keeps Site Manager files, Blueprint JSON, SQLite database, logs, portability actions, and a live WordPress shell in one two-column console, with every save, import, export, delete, and editor action recorded as an event on the same selected Playground object.
focus: Site Manager-led file and data operations
flows: Save a temporary Playground to a local directory with folder picker state, permission denial, permission grant, progress, selected folder identity, local storage badge, saved-row mutation, reload consequence, and ledger event
Generate a ZIP download end to end with source status, packaging progress, generated archive result, selected Playground identity, and transfer history
Export the active Playground to GitHub with session-only account connection, repository target, progress, pushed result, token consequence, and transfer history
Manage the selected Playground through save in browser, rename, delete confirmation, cancel, confirmed deletion, final row state, and fallback to a temporary Playground

Use Site Manager Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, and Settings beside the live site, including file dirty/save state, Blueprint validation/run/copy/download, database download, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, log warnings, and reset consequences

Start or replace through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import with route-specific inputs, validation or replacement warnings, and active-object mutation
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview input
Gutenberg PR or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser state, validation, replacement confirmation, progress, and imported result
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint entries including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save in this browser with progress and saved identity mutation
Save to a local directory with folder picker, permission denied state, permission grant, progress, selected folder identity, local badge, and reload consequence
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, cancel, confirmed deletion, final row state, and temporary fallback
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory storage distinctions
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite controls
Destructive reset and saved/local reload consequences
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint JSON editor with validation, copy link, download bundle, run, warning, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic warning states
Export to GitHub with repository target and completion
Download active Playground as .zip with generated result
Database download
Blueprint bundle actions
Operations ledger and transfer history for saves, edits, downloads, imports, exports, delete, reset, and navigation
